phi_handling.audit_logging: All PHI access logged with 7-year retention
phi_handling.breach_notification: Within 60 days as required by HIPAA

patient_rights: Access to medical records within 30 days

conditions: Refunds available for services not rendered
Copay refunds if appointment cancelled with 24hr notice
No refunds for services already provided
refund.process: Contact billing department with service date and reason. Refunds processed within 14 business days.
exceptions: Prescription medications: no refund once dispensed

emergency_escalation.definition: Life-threatening conditions requiring immediate medical attention
escalation_path: 2. Advise to call 911 or go to ER

sanitization.reports: Aggregated data only, no individual PHI

phi_handling.minimum_necessary: Only access PHI required for the specific task
breach_protocol: 6. Report to HHS if >500 individuals affected

data_retention.hipaa_documentation: 6 years from creation or last effective date

consent_management.withdrawal_process: Submit written request. Note: withdrawal does not affect prior authorized uses.
consent_management.minor_consent: Parent/guardian consent required, with exceptions per state law

appointment_policy.late_arrival: May need to reschedule if >15 minutes late
